titleStmt.title: SII 37.64: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 64. (A.R. No. B 380 of 1938-39.) Guṟṟaṁpāḍu, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Vishnu temple on the river bank.
This is dated Śaka 1500, Bahudhānya, Adhika Āsvija, śu. 15, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1578 A.D., September 15, Monday.

It records the gift of the village Guṟṟampāḍu in Siddhavaṭa-sīma as sarvamānya by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Maṭli Tirumalarājayyadēva-chōḷamahārāju, son of Yallamarāju, and grand son of Kōnamaraju of the Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajus-śakha to Siddhāntasārvabhauma Veṅkata-sōmayāji, son of Tirumala Sōmayāji and grandson of Vellāla Timmājōsya, of the Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra and Ṛik-śākhā for the merit of his parents. Siddhavaṭa-sīma is stated to have been given as amaranāyaṅkara to the donor by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyubhyudaya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1500 Agunēṭi bahudhānya saṁ
vatsara Adhika Āśvīja śu sōmagrahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁdu śrī
madrājādhirājarāĀjaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīra
ṁggadēvadēvamahārāyalu penugoṁḍapaṭṭaṇamaṁdu vajra
siṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthviṁ sāmrājyaṁ sēyucunnuṁḍaṁggā
nu śrīman mahāmaṁḍalēśvara kāśyapa gōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ
yajuśākhādhyāyulaina maṭli kōnamarājugāri pautṛlaina ya
llamarājuṁgāri putṛlaina tirumalrāja Ayyadēvacōḷamahā
rājuluṁgāru bhāradvājasagōtraṁ Āśvalāyana sūtraṁ ru
ku śākhādhyāyulaina vellāla tiṁmājōsyuluṁgāri pautṛlai
na tirumala sōmayājuluṁgāri putuṁḍaina siddhāṁta sā
vvabhaumulaina veṁkaṭa sōmayājuluṁgāriki Iccina bhū
dāna dhamma śāsanaṁ kramameṭlaṁnanu śrīraṁggarāyalu
māku Amaranāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina śiddhavaṭaṁ śīma
naku cellivaccē guṟapāṭi grāmamaṁdu tama taṁli
taṁḍṛlaku puṇyamugānu sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpū
¨rvakaṁgānu ṁgānu valaya śāsanānku lōnainaṭi
[sa¨rvamānya] kariṇika māṁnya dārapōśi kṣētra
putrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu Ā
Anubha
Digital edition of SII 37.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
